name: Sustainable Growth Assessment
description: Evaluate growth direction, operational capacity, and the sustainability of current ways of working.

overview.heading: Sustainable Growth Assessment
overview.description: Explore whether your organization’s ambitions, operating capacity, and day-to-day experience are developing at a sustainable pace.
overview.disclaimer: This assessment offers an initial perspective and is not a comprehensive organizational diagnosis.

stages.name: Growth Direction
stages.description: Clarity, opportunity readiness, and confidence in future growth.

questions.prompt: Our organization can point to meaningful progress during the past year.
Leadership has a clear and practical direction for the next stage of growth.
We can recognize and evaluate worthwhile opportunities when they appear.
We are confident that demand or impact can continue to grow over the next year.

stages.name: Operational Capacity
stages.description: People, leadership time, systems, and processes available to support demand.

questions.prompt: Our team could absorb an unexpected increase in demand without major disruption.
Our systems and processes reliably support the work expected of them.
Leaders have sufficient time and information to guide the organization effectively.
We strengthen capacity before operational pressure becomes urgent.

stages.name: Sustainable Operations
stages.description: How manageable, resilient, and repeatable the current operating model feels.

questions.prompt: New requests frequently leave team members feeling overloaded.
Current workloads can usually be handled without persistent firefighting.
Our present operating model can support where we intend to go.
The organization’s growth feels manageable and repeatable.

profiles.title: Balanced and Ready
profiles.description: Growth direction and operating capacity appear to be developing together, with limited signs of strain.
profiles.recommendation: Continue monitoring capacity as new opportunities are pursued.

profiles.title: Growth Under Pressure
profiles.description: Growth ambition is stronger than the capacity currently available to support it.
profiles.recommendation: Identify the operational constraints carrying the greatest risk before accelerating demand.

profiles.title: Capacity to Activate
profiles.description: The organization may have useful capacity that is not yet being translated into clear growth opportunities.
profiles.recommendation: Clarify which opportunities can be pursued using existing capabilities and resources.

profiles.title: Foundation First
profiles.description: Both direction and operating capacity would benefit from focused development.
profiles.recommendation: Clarify priorities and strengthen the operating foundation before pursuing significant expansion.
